name: Enterprise

name: Organisation
description: Organisation structure and actors

name: Capability
description: Business ability the enterprise performs

name: Information
description: Enterprise information concept

name: Value Stream
description: End-to-end value delivery sequence

name: Business Unit
description: Named organisational unit

name: Business Unit Type
description: Classification of business unit (Enterprise, Business Unit, Partner, Collaborative Team)

name: Stakeholder
description: Person or group with interest in outcomes

name: Business Unit Description
description: Narrative description of business unit role

name: Business Unit Capability
description: Capability possessed by a business unit

name: Stakeholder Type
description: Classification of stakeholder role or nature

name: Stakeholder Category

name: Stakeholder Description

name: Value Stream Stage
description: Discrete stage within a value stream

name: Owning Enterprise
description: Owning enterprise for a value stream

name: Stage Description
description: Descriptive narrative for a value stream stage

name: Value Proposition

name: Entrance Criteria

name: Exit Criteria
